Notice Of Motion For Recomsideration Of Order Determining Percentages Of Ownership Of Estate Property, Authorizing Discrecrestionary Payments For Royality Income To Reimburse K. Sullivan For Her Education Expenses, And Naming A Sole Contract Person For Alma Reed Royalty Rights.
Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Percentages Of Ownership Of Estate Property, For Order Authorizing And Directing Executor To Pay Proportionate Share Of Royalties To Co Owner, For Order Directing Return Of Property To Estate And Petition To Determine If Financial Abuse Of Elder Has Occurred And For Costs Fo Suit
Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Tim Nardell for Kerry Sullivan. Gary Rothstein for San Francisco SPCA. Marilyn Young (Executor) in Propria Persona. Nancy Field for Kimberly Haney. Kevin Frosberg (Co-Trustee) also present.

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to who possesses royalty rights over the book (Peregrina), ambiguity with the language in the will with regard to the word "share", the amount to be paid for Kerry's education, whether the autobiography of Alma Reed is a matter of public domain and the tangible personal property. Ms. Young stated that she wanted to dismiss with prejudice the allegation of financial abuse against Ms. Haney. Ms. Field requested that the action/all of the allegations against Ms. Haney be dismissed with prejudice. The Court will allow Ms. Young's request. Ms. Field will prepare said order and submit it to Ms. Young for approval as to form. The Petition To Determine Title To Real and Personal Property was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition To Determine Percentages Of Ownership Of Estate Property, For Order Authorizing And Directing Executor To Pay Proportionate Share Of Royalties To Co Owner, For Order Directing Return Of Property To Estate And Petition To Determine If Financial Abuse Of Elder Has Occurred And For Costs Fo Suit
